title: Intern, AI Engineer
company_focus:
Entertainment technology and services provider offering
screenwriting software, payroll products, and creative tools
description:
About Us

At Cast & Crew, we’ve empowered creativity and supported the
global entertainment industry for decades. Together with our
family of brands - Backstage, CAPS, Checks & Balances, Final
Draft, Media Services, Sargent-Disc, and The TEAM Companies
– we operate as a combined entertainment technology and
services provider offering industry standard screenwriting
accounting software, digital payroll products, data &
reporting, and a host of creative tools.  The industry
continues to move faster than ever, and the need for our
expertise, our technology, and our people has never been
greater.  We are a production’s best ally every step of the
way. #OneCastOneCrew

Cast & Crew is seeking an AI Engineering Intern to join our
Technology & Product team. This internship provides hands-on
experience building intelligent, AI-powered applications
that support critical workflows in the entertainment
industry.  You’ll work alongside experienced engineers, data
architects, and product managers to design, develop, and
deploy AI-enabled features using modern cloud and
development tools. This is an opportunity to gain real-world
exposure to enterprise AI systems, data pipelines, and
scalable application architecture.

What You’ll Do

- Assist in developing AI-powered applications using Large
  Language Models (LLMs), machine learning models, and
  generative AI tools
- Support the implementation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation
  (RAG) workflows and vector-based search solutions
- Contribute to backend and full-stack development using
  Python and/or TypeScript
- Help build and test APIs that integrate AI services with
  internal applications
- Assist in developing and optimizing data ingestion and
  ETL/ELT pipelines
- Work with engineers to integrate structured and unstructured
  data sources into AI systems
- Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, stand-ups, and
  other agile ceremonies
- Support documentation of architecture, workflows, and
  technical decisions
- Help monitor application performance, troubleshoot issues,
  and improve system reliability
- Collaborate with cybersecurity and data teams to understand
  enterprise security and governance standards

What We’re Looking For

- Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in
  Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or a related
  technical field
- Foundational programming skills in Python (preferred) or
  TypeScript/JavaScript
- Basic understanding of APIs, RESTful services, and web
  application architecture
- Familiarity with AI/ML concepts such as embeddings, model
  inference, or prompt engineering
- Exposure to databases (SQL or NoSQL) and data processing
  concepts
- Understanding of Git and version control best practices
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Curiosity about emerging AI technologies and a desire to
  continuously learn
- Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate in a
  team environment

Nice to Have

- Exposure to cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP
- Familiarity with vector databases or semantic search tools
- Experience with Docker or basic containerization concepts
- Understanding of data governance, security, or compliance
  fundamentals
- Experience working on academic or personal AI/ML projects
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines or automated testing practices

Why Join Us

- Gain hands-on experience building enterprise-grade AI
  solutions
- Work on meaningful projects that support professionals
  across the entertainment industry
- Receive mentorship from experienced engineers and technical
  leaders
- Learn modern AI tooling, cloud architecture, and development
  best practices
- Collaborate in a fast-paced, innovative technology
  environment
- Build technical skills and professional experience in
  applied AI engineering

Special Work Conditions

- Sedentary – Involves sitting most of the time but may
  involve walking or standing for brief periods of time.
  Some positions may entail exerting up to 15 lbs. of force
  occasionally and/or a negligible amount of force to lift,
  carry, push, or pull.

Benefits

Cast & Crew provides a comprehensive package of employee
benefits including: Medical, Dental, Vision, PTO, health and
wellness programs, employee discounts, and more! Note: Cast
& Crew benefits are subject to eligibility requirements.

Cast & Crew is an equal opportunity employer committed to
hiring a diverse workforce and sustaining an inclusive
culture. It is our policy to provide equal employment
opportunities to all individuals based on job-related
qualifications and ability to perform a job, without regard
to age, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, race,
color, religion, creed, national origin, disability, genetic
information, veteran status, citizenship or marital status,
and to maintain a non-discriminatory environment free from
intimidation, harassment or bias based upon these grounds.

CA residents Your personal information may be collected in
connection with certain services provided by Cast & Crew or
its affiliated companies.  A summary of your California
privacy rights can be found at:
https://www.castandcrew.com/privacy-policy/

Compensation is commensurate with various factors including,
but not limited to, relevant experience, qualifications,
skills, training, licensure, certifications, geographic cost
of labor, and other business and organizational needs.
Compensation range for candidates in other locations may
differ based on the cost of labor in that location. The
compensation range for this position is: $30.00 - $35.00 per
hour.
responsibilities: Develop AI-powered applications using LLMs, machine learning models, and generative AI tools
Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflows and vector-based search solutions
Contribute to backend and full-stack development using Python and/or TypeScript
Build and test APIs that integrate AI services with internal applications
Develop and optimize data ingestion and ETL/ELT pipelines
Integrate structured and unstructured data sources into AI systems
Monitor application performance and troubleshoot issues to improve system reliability
Collaborate with cybersecurity and data teams on security and governance standards
use_cases: AI-powered applications for entertainment industry workflows
Automated data processing and pipeline orchestration
Intelligent document and data integration for entertainment production
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building AI-powered applications
using LLMs, implementing RAG workflows, and developing with
generative AI tools. The intern will work hands-on with AI
models and vector search solutions, not just supporting
infrastructure.
